action.reasoning: Observation: DDP training (torchrun) failed twice with rank 3 exit code 1 early. test.py passed single-GPU. Analysis: DDP setup likely encountering an environment-specific issue (could be segfault, config loading, or rank synchronization). Switching to DataParallel avoids DDP complexity and still uses all 4 GPUs efficiently enough for a baseline. Decision: Write a new train.py with DataParallel, validation loss tracking, mixed precision, and checkpoint saving. Run 5 epochs to get baseline mIoU and measure iteration time.
